data.title: Haber recognized by Frost & Sullivan for Industrial AI leadership. San Antonio, Jan. 29, 2026 - Haber awarded 2025 Global Technology Innovation.
data.description: Haber has been recognized for its leadership in AI-driven process control, industrial AI, and measurable industrial performance outcomes. The announcement was made in San Antonio on January 29, 2026. Frost & Sullivan awarded Haber with the 2025 Global Technology Innovation accolade for their achievements.

data.title: Event on Feb 21 in New York to feature Japan's "Shochu" by Kirishima Shuzo and Miyazaki Wagyu Beef.
data.description: One of the leading distillers of "Shochu," Kirishima Shuzo, will be offering its renowned distilled liquor and traditional Japanese dishes, featuring Miyazaki Wagyu "Shabu-shabu." The event will take place in Miyakonojo, Japan, on Saturday, February 21, 2026, as part of a partnership with "JAPAN Fes (*1)." Kirishima Shuzo Co., Ltd. will showcase its signature products at the festival.

data.title: Peter Guenter joins Ipsen Board as a Director, effective Jan 28, 2026, replacing Henri Beaufour.
data.description: In Paris, France on January 29, 2026, Ipsen (Euronext: IPN; ADR: IPSEY) shared news of Peter Guenter joining their Board as a Director on January 28, 2026. This appointment follows the departure of Mr. Henri Beaufour, leading to the need for a new Director.

data.title: Roche reports 7% sales growth in 2025, expects mid single-digit sales increase in 2026, with high single-digit core earnings per share growth, plans to raise dividend in Swiss francs.
data.description: Roche (SIX: RO, ROG; OTCQX: RHHBY) is looking ahead to 2026 with optimism, projecting a growth in Group sales by mid single digits (CER). The company targets the development of core earnings per share in the high single digit range (CER) for the same year. Additionally, Roche plans to raise its dividend payout in Swiss francs.

data.title: Banqup Group (Euronext: BANQ) to release FY 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026 at 7:00 a.m. CET.
data.description: On January 29, 2026 at 7:00 a.m. CET in La Hulpe, Belgium, Banqup Group SA (Euronext: BANQ) announced it will release its financial results for the fiscal year 2025 on Thursday, February 26, 2026 at 7:00 a.m. This company is a prominent supplier of comprehensive business communication solutions.

data.title: Co-founder and board of Cere Network targeted in $100M lawsuit over alleged token sale fraud in second legal action this month.
data.description: This month, Cere Network is encountering its second lawsuit, alleging fraud against its co-founder and board regarding a public token launch in 2021.

data.title: More XRP millionaire wallets growing, holding over 1 million tokens despite weakening crypto market sentiment. Fear rises as popular indicator suggests.
data.description: Despite the overall decline in the cryptocurrency market sentiment, the number of XRP wallets holding over 1 million tokens has increased. This rise is notable as a widely-used cryptocurrency indicator currently indicates "fear" among investors.

data.title: Qoin Wallet Operator fined $14 million by Australia for unlicensed activity, marking one of the largest penalties for crypto marketing in the country.
data.description: This decision represents one of the largest fines imposed by a court in Australia related to cryptocurrency marketing practices.

data.title: Ishikawa in Japan recognized as one of "20 Best Places to Travel in 2026" by BBC Travel, a symbol of recovery post Noto Peninsula Earthquake.
data.description: In Kanazawa, Japan, a strong symbol of resilience emerged following the devastating Noto Peninsula Earthquake. The city has been recognized by BBC Travel in December 2025 as one of "The 20 Best Places to Travel in 2026." This acknowledgment serves as a testament to the region's recovery efforts. The list showcases top destinations worldwide, with Kanazawa standing out for its significance. This nod highlights not only the beauty and appeal of the city but also its importance in the travel industry. With this recognition, Kanazawa hopes to attract an influx of visitors in the upcoming year, boosting tourism numbers and contributing to the local economy's revival.

data.title: Piramal Pharma Limited reports Q3 and 9M FY26 results, ending Dec 31, 2025.(NSE: PPLPHARMA) (BSE: 543635).
data.description: Piramal Pharma Limited, a renowned global pharmaceutical, health, and wellness corporation based in Mumbai, India, released its financial outcomes for the Third Quarter (Q3) and Nine Month (9M) concluding on December 31, 2025. The company's results were announced today, January 29, 2026. Piramal Pharma Limited is listed under the symbols NSE: PPLPHARMA and BSE: 543635.
